---
title: "Ella and John's Wedding Registry"
from: markdown+emoji
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}

## Page under construction

More items to be added.

:::

![](motorbike_gift.png){style="border-radius: 30px;" width=80% fig-align="center"}


<div class="alert alert-primary alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">  <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> <strong>Note:</strong> Please make sure you click the button “I’ve Purchased This Item” after your purchase. I don’t feel like programming a more robust solution for this, sorry.    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button></div>

I don't really like the idea of a registry, but we've been told that people buy you things regardless. So to prevent our house filling up with five different whiteware sets, we provide the following for your consideration.

---

### New couch for our lounge
![](LUNE_DAYBED_LAF_.png){style="border-radius: 30px;" width=100% fig-align="center"}

This is a "daybed" from a furniture store we really like. It has good reviews and is a premium furniture piece that we would probably never bring ourselves to buy if it was not gifted to us.

[Buy this item](https://www.freedomfurniture.co.nz/product/24549042){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}

[I've Purchased This Item](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeyLZHJW66ewn31h_Bxg0VkBsvwxVIv40VsfSgCTS7C0_PCFQ/viewform?usp=dialog){.btn .btn-primary}

---

---

### Ducati Monster (for Ella)
![](2026-ducati-monster.jpg){style="border-radius: 30px;" width=100% fig-align="center"}

This is for practical, reliable, mode of transportation fit for a fuel chris. This is *not for fun*. Ella has wanted this bike since she was 12. I ask you to recall the following quote from *George Bernard Shaw* - "all progress depends on the unreasonable man."

[Buy this item](https://www.royalecars.co.nz/vehicle/2026-Ducati-Monster/19621?s=1){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}

[I've Purchased This Item](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeyLZHJW66ewn31h_Bxg0VkBsvwxVIv40VsfSgCTS7C0_PCFQ/viewform?usp=dialog){.btn .btn-primary}

---
